creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 143764
Grabbed from http://kyua3.nyi.freebsd.org/head/data/0-LATEST/results/usr.bin_yacc_legacy_test_main.html on 06/13/2014

The byacc testcases fail today because the copies checked in under usr.bin/yacc/tests are not in synch with the yacc code.

The testcases from upstream need to be added/integrated into contrib/yacc .
